component.name: Vouch
component.summary: Review-gated knowledge base for LLM agents

description.p: Vouch is a git-native knowledge base where every write goes through a human review gate. Agents propose claims and pages; you approve them with the review console or the CLI. Approved artifacts are plain YAML and markdown on disk — diffable in PRs, auditable, and portable.

This Flatpak ships the browser-based review console (vouch review-ui): a local FastAPI server that lists pending proposals, shows diffs, and records approve/reject decisions in the audit log. Pair it with the vouch CLI or an MCP host adapter for the full propose → review → commit loop.
Filesystem access is limited to your home directory so vouch can read and write .vouch/ trees under your projects and ~/.vouch/.

screenshot.caption: Review queue — pending proposals awaiting human approval
Proposal detail — diff and metadata before approve/reject

description.p: Initial Flatpak packaging for the vouch review console (#211).
